segments.text: Moses, with the elders of Israel, commanded the people, saying:
Keep all the commandments which I command you today.
segments.speaker: Moses

segments.text: And it shall be, on the day when you cross over the Jordan to the land which the Lord your God is giving you,
that you shall set up for yourselves large stones, and whitewash them with lime.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: You shall write on them all the words of this law, when you have crossed over, that you may enter the land which the Lord your God is giving you, 'a land flowing with milk and honey,' just as the Lord God of your fathers promised you.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Therefore it shall be, when you have crossed over the Jordan, that on Mount Ebal you shall set up these stones, which I command you today, and you shall whitewash them with lime.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: And there you shall build an altar to the Lord your God, an altar of stones; you shall not use an iron tool on them.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: You shall build with whole stones the altar of the Lord your God, and offer burnt offerings on it to the Lord your God.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: You shall offer peace offerings, and shall eat there, and rejoice before the Lord your God.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: And you shall write very plainly on the stones all the words of this law.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Moses and the priests, the Levites, spoke to all Israel, saying:
Take heed and listen, O Israel: This day you have become the people of the Lord your God.
segments.speaker: Moses

segments.text: Therefore you shall obey the voice of the Lord your God, and observe His commandments and His statutes which I command you today.
segments.speaker: Moses

segments.text: Moses commanded the people on the same day, saying:
These shall stand on Mount Gerizim to bless the people, when you have crossed over the Jordan: Simeon, Levi, Judah, Issachar, Joseph, and Benjamin;
segments.speaker: Moses

segments.text: and these shall stand on Mount Ebal to curse: Reuben, Gad, Asher, Zebulun, Dan, and Naphtali.
segments.speaker: Moses

segments.text: And the Levites shall speak with a loud voice and say to all the men of Israel:
Cursed is the one who makes a carved or molded image, an abomination to the Lord, the work of the hands of the craftsman, and sets it up in secret.
segments.speaker: Levites

segments.text: Amen!
segments.speaker: All the people

segments.text: Cursed is the one who treats his father or his mother with contempt.
segments.speaker: Levites

segments.text: Amen!
segments.speaker: All the people

segments.text: Cursed is the one who moves his neighbor's landmark.
segments.speaker: Levites

segments.text: Amen!
segments.speaker: All the people

segments.text: Cursed is the one who makes the blind to wander off the road.
segments.speaker: Levites

segments.text: Amen!
segments.speaker: All the people

segments.text: Cursed is the one who perverts the justice due the stranger, the fatherless, and widow.
segments.speaker: Levites

segments.text: Amen!
segments.speaker: All the people

segments.text: Cursed is the one who lies with his father's wife, because he has uncovered his father's bed.
segments.speaker: Levites

segments.text: Amen!
segments.speaker: All the people

segments.text: Cursed is the one who lies with any kind of animal.
segments.speaker: Levites

segments.text: Amen!
segments.speaker: All the people

segments.text: Cursed is the one who lies with his sister, the daughter of his father or the daughter of his mother.
segments.speaker: Levites

segments.text: Amen!
segments.speaker: All the people

segments.text: Cursed is the one who lies with his mother-in-law.
segments.speaker: Levites

segments.text: Amen!
segments.speaker: All the people

segments.text: Cursed is the one who attacks his neighbor secretly.
segments.speaker: Levites

segments.text: Amen!
segments.speaker: All the people

segments.text: Cursed is the one who takes a bribe to slay an innocent person.
segments.speaker: Levites

segments.text: Amen!
segments.speaker: All the people

segments.text: Cursed is the one who does not confirm all the words of this law by observing them.
segments.speaker: Levites

segments.text: Amen!
segments.speaker: All the people
